name: Magnesium Chloride Flakes
description: A highly soluble magnesium salt used to create 'magnesium oil' for topical magnesium delivery, foot soaks, and bath applications.
appearance: White to off-white crystalline flakes or pellets; hygroscopic; bitter taste
chemistry: Dissolved in water creates 'magnesium oil.' Some pilot studies positive for transdermal absorption; 2017 NIH review noted evidence remains limited.
warnings: Tingles initially. Transdermal evidence promising but unproven. Pair with dietary magnesium.
shelfLife: Indefinite when stored dry (hygroscopic — keep sealed)
